_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Mice in NCTD treated group were sacrificed at day 12 when two of six xenograft tumors reached 10% body weight...treatment with the PP2A inhibitor Norcantharidin (NCTD) showed no tumor suppressive effect
details: Treatment with Norcantharidin (NCTD) at 10 mg/kg/day showed no tumor suppressive effect, with mice sacrificed at day 12 when two of six xenograft tumors reached 10% body weight
